shot_type_and_framing: close-up shot of a round cake stand with assorted sweets centered in the lower third of the vertical frame, with a softly blurred group of four people sitting on a couch in the background occupying the upper half
camera_movement: slow push-in towards the sweets, maintaining the group softly blurred in the background
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel with a shallow depth of field, around 85mm focal length style, strong bokeh effect focusing sharply on the sweets while keeping background figures out of focus
environment_description: warmly lit indoor living room setting with a wooden table, soft beige sofa, decorative string lights, and glowing candles creating a cozy atmosphere
subject_description: a marble-top cake stand with a golden base displaying an assortment of brightly colored Indian sweets such as yellow and orange confections and white square pieces, placed on a wooden table
motion_behavior: natural, realistic slow camera push-in, no abrupt or unnatural movements
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, realistic, premium, and warmly intimate filmic tone with a focus on calm and inviting ambiance
